text:
Fumi (フミ, Fumi) is a receptionist at the Southernpiece Auction House in Yorknew City. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 10, Chapter 85 

Appearance

Fumi is a lady of average height who has medium-length hair, thin eyebrows, and an almond-shaped head. She wears a one-piece dress over a white dress shirt, pantyhose, and shoes. 

Personality

Fumi presents herself in a professional and cordial manner. 

Plot

Yorknew City arc

Fumi welcomes Gon, Killua, and Leorio as they enter the Southernpiece Auction House. Once Gon purchases a Southernpiece Catalog for 12 million, Fumi explains that all the items for the year's auction are listed inside. She shows them the card used as their admission ticket and adds that up to five people can use it to attend the auction during its five days. She asks Gon whose name he wants to register the card, and Gon happily volunteers to use his own after Killua and Leorio give him smiles of approval. 

Shortly afterward, Fumi welcomes Milluki to the auction house, and he also requests to purchase a catalog. 

Manga Appearances

Translations around the World

Trivia

Fumi's Japanese voice actress Yuki Kaida, also voiced Kurapika and Heavens Arena 200th Floor Clerk in the 1999 anime adaptation.

Anime and Manga Differences

Fumi makes a cameo appearance in Episode 71 in the 1999 anime adaptation. Hunter × Hunter - Episode 71 (1999)
